nasb.text: He built the city all around, from the Millo even to the surrounding area; and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

esv.text: And he built the city all around from the Millo in complete circuit, and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

cnv.text: 大衛又重建四周的城牆，從米羅起，以至城的周圍；那城其餘的部分由約押修建。

ccb.text: 大卫又从米罗开始，在四围修建城墙，其余的部分由约押修建。
